name: telegram
description: Send Telegram notifications from Codex, including optional task-completion and long-task alerts.

interface.shortDescription: Send task updates and completion alerts to Telegram
interface.longDescription: Link Codex to a personal Telegram bot and send polished notifications when tasks finish. Includes a guided first-time setup, direct message tools, optional Codex hooks for automatic completion alerts, and a configurable long-task threshold.
defaultPrompt: Set up Telegram notifications for Codex.
Send me a Telegram when this task is done.
